name: read_memory
description:
Read a memory's full markdown body.

`identifier` matches case-insensitive H1 title first, then filename, then absolute path. Use `list_memories` first to discover identifiers.

identifier.description: Memory title (preferred), filename like "my-note.md", or absolute path returned by list_memories.

cwd.description: Optional. Absolute path used to discover the hub by walking up for `.bridgememory/`. Defaults to the server's process cwd.
